case_title: LIPPI, BOB AKA BOB LIPPI SIGNS VS SAN FRANCISCO SENTINEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $759.50 FILED BY LIPPI, BOB AKA BOB LIPPI SIGNS AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SENTINEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SENTINEL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SENTINEL
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-31-1995, GRANTED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIPPI, BOB AKA BOB LIPPI SIGNS HEARING SET FOR JAN-31-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIPPI, BOB AKA BOB LIPPI SIGNS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SENTINEL $750.50 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $800.50, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR AT TIME CASE WAS CALLED. PLTF HAD LEFT COURT WHEN DEFT ARRIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SENTINEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-02-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-14-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
